working_on: P_3 — Phase 4.5 Input Dataset Survey: populate Cross-Domain Reference Inventories survey in product/docs/content-strategy.md across five usability axes and four tiers; reframe Tier 4 to evaluate graph-shape value distinct from content value; author new product ADR extending structural-reference posture from SEP-only to a class of philosophy reference works.
outcome_summary: Phase 4.5 input dataset survey closed. content-strategy.md 'Cross-Domain Reference Inventories — Survey' populated across all four tiers with per-candidate URL-cited assessments. Tier 1: 5 prerequisite-shaped (Khan, ConceptNet, university CS, Mathlib, Metamath). Tier 2: 8 non-philosophy domain candidates per expansion.md. Tier 3: Önduygu, Open Syllabus, Semantic Scholar. Tier 4: SEP, IEP, Routledge, Oxford Reference, Wikipedia — reframed to evaluate graph-shape value distinct from content value per new ADR 0046 (structural-reference posture extends from SEP-only to a class of philosophy reference works; Generative Graph Independence + ADR 0011 unchanged). ADR count 45 → 46 (12 engine + 34 product). Validator clean. Course-correction by user: prior STATE.md projection had skipped P_3 toward Phase 5 directly; build_plan/00_session_schedule.md sequences P_4 after P_3. Operational anomaly: mempalace_search wing='paideia' throws 'Error finding id'; unfiltered search works; flagged for next-session investigation. Next: S-0039 Phase 5 epistemology gate.
